ready_for_verification_description: Unofakazi abaqinisekisiwe abangu-{count}. I-AFROLOC yakho manje ingaqinisekiswa.
verification_options_description: Khetha ezindleleni eziningi zokuqinisekisa ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi bakho.
verify_process_step_1_desc: Okungenani ofakazi aba-2 baqinisekisa indawo yakho yokuhlala
primary_residence_updated: Indawo yakho yokuhlala eyinhloko ibuyekezwe ngempumelelo
primary_residence_info: Leli ikheli lakho elisemthethweni lokusebenza kweziphathimandla
about_description: Ukuguqula amakheli wedijithali e-Afrika ngokubuchwepheshe okubandakanya wonke umuntu, ukuqinisekiswa komphakathi kanye ne-georeferencing enembayo.
mission_text: Ukunikeza wonke umuntu wase-Afrika ikheli ledijithali elikhethekile, eliqinisekisiwe nelikhishwayo, ukuthuthukisa ukubandakanywa kwezezimali, ukufinyelela ezinsizakalweni ezibalulekile kanye nokuqinisa ukuzikhomba kwezwekazi.
vision_text: Ukuba uhlelo lwamakheli wedijithali lwezwekazi olukhonjiwe, oluxhuma abantu base-Afrika abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-1 futhi lube yingqalasizinda ebalulekile ekuthuthukisweni okusimemayo kwezwekazi.
values_subtitle: Izimiso eziyisisekelo eziqondisa zonke izinqumo nezenzo
value_inclusion_desc: Sikholwa ukuthi wonke umuntu wase-Afrika ufanelwe yikheli ledijithali eliqinisekisiwe, kungakhathaleki indawo yakhe noma isimo sakhe somnotho.
value_security_desc: Sivikela ukuzikhomba nobumfihlo babasebenzisi ngokuqinisekiswa komphakathi kanye ne-encryption ephakeme.
value_community_desc: Uhlelo luqinisekiswa ngumphakathi ngokwawo, luqinisekisa ubuqiniso futhi luqinisa ubudlelwano bomphakathi.
value_interoperability_desc: Sakha uhlelo lwezwekazi olusebenza ngaphandle kwemingcele, oluxhuma yonke i-Afrika.
team_subtitle: Ochwepheshe abazinikele ekuguquleni amakheli wedijithali e-Afrika
cta_about_description: Yiba yingxenye yomkhankaso oguqula amakheli wedijithali e-Afrika
timeline_conception_desc: Ukuqala kokuthuthukiswa komqondo wamakheli wedijithali wezwekazi e-Afrika
timeline_prototyping_desc: Ukuthuthukiswa kwesibonelo sokuqala nokuhlola nemiphakathi e-Angola
timeline_community_validation_desc: Ukusetshenziswa kohlelo lokuqinisekiswa kofakazi namazinga okuvunywa
timeline_regional_expansion_desc: Ukuqala emazweni amaningi ase-Afrika ngokusekelwa kwezilimi eziningi
timeline_financial_integration_desc: Ubambiswano nezinkampani zezimali ukuze kubandakanywe amabhange
team_ceo_desc: I-PhD ku-Geographic Information Systems, iminyaka engu-15 yolwazi ku-digital infrastructure yase-Afrika.
team_cto_desc: Owayengunjiniyela omkhulu we-Google Maps, ongoti ku-georeferencing namasistemu ahlukanisiwe.
team_community_desc: Uhholile amaphrojekthi okubandakanywa kwedijithali emazweni angu-12 ase-Afrika, ukhuluma izilimi ezingu-6 zase-Afrika.
team_engineering_desc: Umakhi wamasistemu onolwazi kumapulatifomu amakhulu ne-blockchain.
admin_security_notice: Lesi sangeno lokungena singomlawuli wohlelo kuphela. Yonke imizamo yokufinyelela irekhodwa futhi iqashiwe.
max_attempts_exceeded: Imizamo ephezulu iseqile. Cela ikhodi entsha.
too_many_attempts: Imizamo eminingi kakhulu. Zama futhi kamuva.
download_app_subtitle: Finyelela uhlelo lokukhomba ikheli ngqo kusuka efonini yakho
subject: Isihloko
faq_subtitle: Thola izimpendulo zemibuzo ejwayelekile mayelana ne-AFROLOC
ios_safari_required: Ukuze ufake le app ku-iOS, KUFANELE usebenzise isiphequluli se-Safari. Uma usebenzisa esinye isiphequluli (Chrome, Firefox, njll.), sicela uvule le linki ku-Safari kuqala.
scan_qr_code: Skena ikhodi ye-QR ngekhamera yefoni yakho
qr_instructions: Khomba ikhamera yefoni yakho kukhodi engenhla bese ulandela iziqondiso zokufaka i-app
ios_step1: Vula le sayithi ku-Safari (isiphequluli esimisiwe se-iPhone)
ios_step2: Thepha inkinobho yokwabelana (uphawu lwesikwele olunohlaka olukhomba phezulu) ngezansi kwesikrini
ios_step3: Skrolela phansi kumenyu bese uthepha "Engeza Esikrinini Sasekhaya"
ios_step5: Kwenziwe! Uphawu lwe-app luzovela esikrinini sakho sasekhaya
use_smartphone: Sebenzisa ifoni yakho ukuze uthole ulwazi olungcono
scan_qr_above: Noma skena ikhodi ye-QR engenhla ngefoni yakho
pwa_no_store: Progressive Web App (PWA) - Akudingeki ukulanda esitolo se-app
benefit_quick_access_desc: Qalisa ngqo kusuka esikrinini sasekhaya njenge-app yomdabu
benefit_offline_desc: Finyelela idatha yakho ngisho ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi
benefit_native_exp_desc: Isixhumanisi esithuthukiselwe ifoni, ngaphandle kwebha yesiphequluli
ios_install_step1: Thepha inkinobho Yokwabelana (isikwele esinomcibisholo okhomba phezulu) ku-Safari
ios_install_step2: Skrolela phansi bese uthepha "Engeza Esikrinini Sasekhaya"
ios_install_step4: Uphawu lwe-AFROLOC luzovela esikrinini sakho sasekhaya
android_install_step1: Thepha imenyu (amachashazi amathathu) ekhoneni eliphezulu ngakwesokudla ye-Chrome
android_install_step4: Uphawu lwe-AFROLOC luzovela esikrinini sakho sasekhaya
pwa_preview_note: I-PWA isebenza kangcono uma i-app ishicilelwe. Ku-preview, ezinye izici zingase zilinganiselwe.
publish_instructions: Chofoza inkinobho ethi "Publish" ku-AFROLOC ukuze uthole i-URL yokukhiqiza. Bese ufinyelela leyo URL futhi uphawu lokufaka luzovela ngokuzenzakalelayo.
select_access_description: Khetha indlela ofuna ukungena ngayo ohlelweni
hero_title: Ikheli ledijithali kumuntu ngamunye — ngisho ngaphandle komgwaqo noma inombolo.
hero_description: E-Afrika, izigidi zabantu azinawo amakheli — futhi ngaphandle kwekheli akukho ibhange, ukulethwa noma izinsizakalo. Yakha i-AFROLOC yakho: ikhodi eyingqayizivele neqinisekisekayo yendawo ohlala kuyo.
why_description: Amakhulu ezigidi zabantu base-Afrika — mhlawumbe ngaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-500 — abanalo ikheli elisemthethweni
feature_addressing_desc: Ukubhekisela kwendawo ngqo ngisho ezindaweni ezingenamigwaqo enamagama
feature_verification_desc: Ukubuyekezwa ngokuzenzakalelayo njalo ngezinyanga ezi-6-18 kuye ngesifunda
feature_apis_desc: Ukuhlanganiswa okulula nama-fintechs, izinsizakalo zeposi ne-e-government
step1_desc: Phawula ikhaya lakho ngokulawula kwe-GPS nge-app yeselula. Uhlelo lwenza i-AFROLOC yesikhashana ngokusekelwe endaweni yakho nesakhiwo sokuphatha.
step2_desc: Omakhelwane abathathu nesiphathimandla sendawo siyaqinisekisa ikhaya lakho. Ukuqinisekiswa kwenziwa nge-SMS noma ngesiginesha sedijithali.
step3_desc: Ukuvuselelwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngezaziso zesikhathi ngesikhathi (izinyanga ezi-6-18 kuye ngesifunda). Zonke izinguquko ziqoshwa ngophawu lwesikhathi.
cta_description: Joyina izinkulungwane zama-Afrika anamakheli edijithali aqinisekisiwe
phone_already_registered_desc: Le nombolo yocingo isixhumene ne-akhawunti kakade.
use_login_instead: Le nombolo isibhaliswe kakade. Sicela ungene.
invalid_credentials: Sicela ufake i-imeyili nephasiwedi evumelekile (okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6)
onboarding_description: Khetha konke okusebenzayo. Lokhu kusisiza ukulungiselela okuhlangenwe nakho kwakho.
language_updated_desc: Ulimi lushintshelwe ngokuzenzakalela ngokusekelwe ezweni elikhethiwe
basic_info_desc: Faka izwe lakho nendawo yakho ukulungiselela okuhlangenwe nakho
location_permission_denied: Imvume yendawo yenqatshelwe. Sicela unike i-GPS amandla.
location_error: Iphutha ekutholeni indawo. Sicela uzame futhi.
gps_unavailable: I-GPS ayitholakali noma ivaliwe. Sicela uvule i-GPS ezilungiselelweni zedivayisi yakho bese uzama futhi.
gps_timeout: Isikhathi siphelelwe ekuzameni ukuthola indawo. Qiniseka ukuthi i-GPS ivuliwe bese uzama futhi.
challenge_desc: Amakhulu ezigidi zabantu base-Afrika — mhlawumbe ngaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-500 — abanalo ikheli elisemthethweni
challenge_step1_desc: E-Kinshasa, Lagos, Luanda nezinye izidolobha zase-Afrika, izigidi zabantu ziphila ngaphandle kwamakheli asemthethweni
challenge_step2_desc: Ama-ambulensi awakafiki, incwadi iyalahleka, ukulethwa akunakwenzeka
challenge_step3_desc: Amabhange ase-Afrika adinga ubufakazi bokuhlala abantu abaningi abangenawo
challenge_step4_desc: Yakhelwe futhi yase-Afrika, ihlonipha amaqiniso ethu amadolobha
addressing_desc: Ukubonisa indawo ngqo ngisho nasezindaweni ezingenayo imigwaqo enamagama
addressing_step1_desc: Emazungezweni e-Luanda noma kumphakathi we-Kinshasa, i-GPS ithola ikhaya lakho
addressing_step2_desc: Silungiswe izigaba zezwe ngalinye: izifundazwe, omasipala, izikhungo, izigodi
addressing_step4_desc: Iyasebenza nge-inthanethi engaqhubekile, okuvamile emadolobheni amaningi ase-Afrika
validation_step1_desc: Isikhulu sokuphatha sendawo sivakashela izigaba futhi sibhalise izakhamizi
validation_step2_desc: Ihlanganisa ukubhalisa okungama-50-100 kusuka esigodini esisodwa ukuze kuqinisekiswe ndawonye
validation_step3_desc: Igunya lendawo liyazi umphakathi futhi liqinisekisa ukuqiniseka
validation_step4_desc: Lenyusela kumasipala, esifundazweni, ligcine uchungechunge lase-Afrika lokuthembana
financial_desc: Ukufinyelela ezinsizakalweni zamabhange, ikrediti nomshwalense e-Afrika
financial_step1_desc: I-BAI, BCI, Ecobank yamukela i-AFROLOC ukuvula ama-akhawunti abadayisi abangahlelekile
financial_step2_desc: Izinhlangano ezibambisanayo zase-Afrika ne-IMF zingathola abadayisi abancane
financial_step3_desc: I-M-Pesa, Orange Money ixhumanisa izinkokhelo zedijitali nekheli eliphathekayo
financial_step4_desc: Izinkampani zomshwalense zase-Afrika zinikeza ukuvikelwa kulabo abangakaze bakuthole
verification_step1_desc: I-Luanda, Lagos, Kinshasa ikhula ngokushesha: ukuqinisekiswa okubili ngonyaka
verification_step2_desc: Izindawo zamadolobha ezinzile: ukuvuselela kwaminyaka yonke kwanele
verification_step3_desc: Isaziso ngeziteshi ezithandwayo e-Afrika uma isikhathi sokufaka sicishe sifike
verification_step4_desc: Umenzeli womphakathi uvakashela noma isakhamuzi siqinisekisa e-posini yokuphatha
interop_desc: Kuhambisana kuwo wonke amazwe ase-Afrika angu-54 nezakhiwo zawo
interop_step1_desc: Izinga elamukelwe i-AU lisebenza kusukela e-Cairo kuya e-Cape Town
interop_step2_desc: Izwe ngalinye ligcina isakhiwo salo: wilaya, région, isifundazwe, estado
interop_step3_desc: Kwenza ukuhweba kube lula emiphakathini yomnotho wesifunda sase-Afrika
interop_step4_desc: I-UN, World Bank, DHL iyamukela i-AFROLOC njengekheli elivumelekile
apis_step1_desc: I-REST API enezibonelo zabathuthukisi base-Afrika ukuze bahlanganise kalula
apis_step2_desc: I-Flutterwave, Paystack, Yoco iqinisekisa amakheli ngesikhathi sangempela
apis_step3_desc: Izinkundla zokuhweba ze-inthanethi zase-Afrika zisebenzisa i-AFROLOC yokulethwa
apis_step4_desc: Izikhungo zikahulumeni zase-Afrika zixhuma amarekhodi ezakhamuzi nezintela
process_geo_desc: Khomba ikhaya lakho ngezinhlelelo ze-GPS nge-app yeselula
process_wit_desc: Omakhelwane abathathu baqinisekisa ikhaya lakho negama lakho
otp_sent_desc: Sicela uhlole ucingo lwakho bese ufaka ikhodi oyitholile
phone_must_start_with_plus: Inombolo kufanele iqale ngo-+ ilandelwa ikhodi yezwe
forgot_password_description: Faka i-imeyili yakho bese sithumela isixhumanisi sokubuyisela iphasiwedi yakho
reset_email_sent_description: Hlola i-imeyili yakho ulandele imiyalelo yokubuyisela iphasiwedi yakho
didnt_receive_email: Awukitholanga i-imeyili? Hlola ifolda ye-spam noma zama futhi.
password_too_short: Iphasiwedi kufanele ibe nezinhlamvu okungenani ezi-6
view_manage_user_levels: Buka uphathise amazinga okuvunywa kwabasebenzisi ohlelweni
complete_list_users: Uhlu oluphelele lwabasebenzisi namazinga abo okuvunywa
manage_your_afroloc_addresses: Phatha amakheli akho e-AFROLOC endaweni eyodwa
add_first_address_description: Qala ngokufaka ikheli lakho lokuqala le-AFROLOC ukumisela isikhombi sakho sedijithali
enter_new_phone_description: Faka inombolo yakho entsha yocingo ukuthola ikhodi yokuqinisekisa
enter_otp_description: Faka ikhodi yokuqinisekisa ethunyelwe enombolweni yakho entsha
change_phone_warning: Inombolo yakho yocingo iyisikhombi sakho esiyinhloko. Wonke amakheli akho e-AFROLOC azoqhubeka ehlotshaniswa ne-akhawunti yakho.
phone_is_primary_identifier: Inombolo yocingo iyisikhombi esiyinhloko se-akhawunti yakho
phone_change_notification_sent: Izaziso zokuphepha zithunyelwe ezinombolweni ezindala nezintsha
phone_change_notifications_info: Uzothola izaziso nge-SMS ezinombolweni ezindala nezintsha, kanye nokuqinisekiswa nge-imeyili
phone_change_cooldown_message: Uzokwazi ukushintsha inombolo yakho futhi ezinsukwini ezingu-{days}. Lokhu kuvikela i-akhawunti yakho ekushintshweni okungavunyelwe.
remove_biometric_description: Lokhu kuzosusa izinqinisekiso zakho ze-biometric ezigcinwe. Kuzodingeka ungene nge-imeyili nephasiwedi ngokuzayo.
biometric_setup_instructions: Ukuze uvule ukuqinisekiswa nge-biometric, ngena nge-imeyili nephasiwedi. I-biometric izolungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kokungeniswa ngempumelelo kokuqala.
language_independent_note: Lolu hlelo luzimele ezweni elikhethiwe futhi lizosebenza kuwo wonke u-app.
complete_profile_to_create: Qedela iphrofayela yakho ukudala amarekhodi e-AFROLOC.
create_first_afroloc: Dala i-AFROLOC yakho yokuqala ukuqala ngekheli ledijithali
try_different_search: Zama ukusesha ngamagama ahlukile noma ulungise izihlungi
manage_phone_structures: Phatha izakhiwo zezinombolo zocingo nokuhamba kwe-OTP
prefixes_note: Iziqalo kufanele zibhaliswe NGAPHANDLE kwekhodi yezwe (isb: 923, 924, 925). Uhlelo lungeza ngokuzenzakalelayo ikhodi yezwe ekutholeni.
add_operators_desc: Engeza abashayeli bezingcingo ukuvula ukuhamba kwe-OTP okuhlakaniphile ngokusekelwe ezinombolweni zocingo
delete_operator_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lo mshayeli?
preallocate_numbers_desc: Abela izinombolo zendawo kuqala ukuqinisekisa kwe-OTP ngokohlukaniso lwezokuphatha
allocate_number_desc: Abela inombolo yocingo ukuqinisekisa kwe-OTP endaweni ethile
anti_fraud_desc: Izinombolo ezabelwe kuqala zinciphisa inkohliso ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi izingcingo ze-OTP zivela ezinombolweni zendawo eziqinisekisiwe ezihlotshaniswa nezindawo zokuphatha ezithile.
add_validation_numbers_desc: Engeza izinombolo zocingo zokuqinisekisa ukuvula ukuqinisekiswa kwe-OTP okulondekile nokwendawo
delete_validation_number_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le nombolo yokuqinisekisa?
add_resolution_notes: Engeza amanothi mayelana nokuthi lesi sehlakalo sixazululwe kanjani
describe_actions_taken: Chaza izenzo ezithathiwe ukuxazulula lesi sehlakalo...
about_subtitle: Umsebenzi wethu wokuguqula ikheli ledijithali e-Afrika
about_mission_text: Ukunikeza isakhamuzi ngasinye sase-Afrika ikheli ledijithali eliqinisekisiwe, sikhuthaza ukufakwa kwezezimali, ukufinyelela ezinsizakalweni nentuthuko yomphakathi ngobuchwepheshe obusungulayo nokuqinisekiswa komphakathi.
gpsDiscrepancyDescription: Indawo yedivayisi ayifani nendawo yesithombe. Lokhu kungase kubonise ukuphazamiseka.
country_configuration_desc: Lungiselela izilungiselelo ezithile zezwe zohlelo lwe-AFROLOC
label: Ilebula
kpi_approval_rate_legend: Iphesenti yamarekhodi aqinisekisiwe noma asayiniwe uma kuqhathaniswa nesamba.
kpi_avg_verification_time_legend: Isikhathi esilinganiselwe phakathi kokudala noshintsho lwesimo serekhodi.
kpi_gps_precision_legend: Ibanga elilinganiselwe phakathi kwezinhlelelo zedivayisi ne-EXIF yesithombe.
kpi_approval_rate_desc: Iphesenti yamarekhodi aqinisekisiwe noma asayiniwe uma kuqhathaniswa nesamba.
kpi_verification_time_desc: Isikhathi esilinganiselwe phakathi kokudala noshintsho lwesimo serekhodi.
gps_spoofing_gps_exif_mismatch_desc: Umehluko wama-{distance}m phakathi kwe-GPS yedivayisi ne-EXIF yesithombe
gps_spoofing_timestamp_inconsistent_desc: Umehluko wamahora angu-{hours} phakathi kwesikhathi sedivayisi ne-EXIF
gps_spoofing_impossible_movement_desc: Isivinini esibaliwe sama-{speed} km/h singaphandle kwamandla omzimba
gps_spoofing_rec_outdoor: Thatha isithombe ngaphandle ukuze uthole isiginesha engcono
ats_tooltip_description: I-ATS ingamaphuzu alinganisiwe (0-100) asekelwe ekunembeni kwe-GPS, izimpawu ze-telecom, ukuqinisekiswa kwe-EXIF, ukuqinisekiswa kwofakazi nemibhalo.
kpi_region_comparison_desc: Qhathanisa izimethrikhi zokusayina phakathi kwezifunda ezihlukene
witness_reputation_description: Idumela lofakazi libalwa ngokusekelwe kumlando wokuqinisekiswa, ukuqinisekiswa nokwenqatshelwa
fraud_no_history_hint: Umlando wakho uzovela lapha uma ufakazela amakheli
fraud_reputation_influence: Idumela lithinta isisindo sobufakazi bakho ekubalweni kwe-ATS
fraud_flags_management_description: Phatha uphenyisise izexwayiso zokuziphatha okusoluswayo kofakazi
search_fraud_flags: Sesha amafulegi ngegama, ucingo noma ikhodi...
resolve_fraud_flag_description: Engeza amanothi mayelana nokuxazululwa kwalesi sexwayiso senkohliso
admin_only_access: Abaphathi kuphela abangakwazi ukufinyelela leli khasi
address_type_informal_desc: Ikheli elingenalo igama lomgwaqo noma inombolo esemthethweni
address_update_description: Gcwalisa imikhakha engezansi uma umgwaqo wakho usuthole igama elisemthethweni noma indlu yakho isithole inombolo enikwe uhulumeni wendawo. Uhlelo luzobuyekeza uhlobo lwekheli ngokuzenzekelayo kusuka kwengekho semthethweni kuya kwesemthethweni.
address_type_explanation: Ngemva kokugcwalisa igama lomgwaqo NENOMBOLO, ikheli lizohlelwa ngokuzenzekelayo njengeSemthethweni. Uma kungenjalo, lizoba Elingekho semthethweni. Ikheli lizoba Yedijithali kuphela ngemva kokuqinisekiswa iziphathimandla.
public_address_confirmed: Ikheli lakho liqinisekisiwe. Ikheli liqinisekiswe ngempumelelo.
public_contact_services: Inqubo yakho idinga ukuqinisekiswa okwengeziwe. Sicela uthintane namasevisi ethu.
delete_address_warning: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli kheli le-AFROLOC? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
mitigation_property_monitoring: Lolu hlobo lwempahla ludinga ukuqashwa okwengeziwe
mitigation_low_ats: Amaphuzu e-ATS aphansi - kuyadingeka ukuqinisekiswa kaningi
mitigation_over_1_year: Ukuqinisekiswa okuphuthumayo - okugcina ngaphezu konyaka owedlule
witnesses_required_message: Udinga okungenani ofakazi abangu-{count} abaqinisekisiwe ukuqinisekisa i-AFROLOC yakho
witness_contract_legal_note: Lo fakazi usayine inkontileka yomthetho eqinisekisa ukuthi wazi umhlali ngokwakhe futhi uqinisekisa ukunemba kolwazi lwekheli olinikeziwe. Isiginesha iyabophezela ngokwemithetho.
waiting_for_witness_confirmation: Kulindele ukuthi ufakazi aqinisekise futhi asayine inkontileka
once_witnesses_confirm_authority_validat: Uma ofakazi beqinisekisile, isiphathimandla singaqinisekisa i-AFROLOC yakho
upload_manage_documents_desc: Layisha uphinde uphathe imibhalo yakho yokuqinisekisa ubunikazi
upload_documents_to_verify: Layisha imibhalo yobunikazi ukuqinisekisa i-AFROLOC yakho
quick_action_verify_desc: Uzothunyelwa ukuze uqale inqubo yokuqinisekisa ikheli elisha le-AFROLOC.
quick_action_report_desc: Uzothunyelwa endaweni yokwenza nokubuka imibiko yemisebenzi.
no_record_found_desc: Ikheli olifunayo alitholakalanga noma alikho. Hlola isazisi bese uzama futhi, noma ubuyele ohlwini lwamakheli.
no_reports_desc: Akukho ukuqinisekisa okurekhothiwe esikhathini esikhethiwe. Lungisa isikhathi sokuhlaziya noma ulinde ukuqinisekisa okusha kucutshungulwe.
no_users_found_desc: Abekho abasebenzisi abafana nezimfuneko zosesho. Zama ukulungisa izihluzi noma usesho lwakho.
